title: Project Alpha
description: A real-time dashboard for monitoring distributed system health across multiple data centers.
longDescription: Built a comprehensive monitoring dashboard that aggregates metrics from 50+ microservices across three data centers. Features real-time alerting, historical trend analysis, and automated incident response workflows. Reduced mean-time-to-detection by 60%.

title: Project Beta
description: An enterprise resource planning system with modular architecture serving 500+ concurrent users.
longDescription: Designed and developed a modular ERP platform handling inventory management, order processing, and financial reporting. Architected the plugin system that allowed third-party integrations without core modifications. Migrated legacy data from 3 disparate systems.

title: Project Gamma
description: Desktop application for industrial asset management with offline-first synchronization.
longDescription: Developed a WPF desktop application for tracking and managing industrial equipment across multiple facility locations. Implemented offline-first architecture with SQLite local storage and background sync when connectivity is restored. Integrated with IoT sensor data for predictive maintenance alerts.
